config.script:
deviceModels = decoders.model.listDeviceProfiles(self.session.custom.tenantID)

	mfgOptions = {}
	options = []
	for device in deviceModels:
		model = device["model_name"]
		modelID = device['id']
		mfg = device['manufacturer']
		options.append({"value": modelID, "label":model})
		if mfg in mfgOptions.keys():
			mfgOptions[mfg].append({"value": modelID, "label":model})
		else:
			mfgOptions[mfg] = []
			mfgOptions[mfg].append({"value": modelID, "label":model})
	self.props.options = options
	
	mOptions = []
	for m in mfgOptions.keys():
		mOptions.append({"value": mfgOptions[m], "label":m})
	self.view.custom.models = options
	self.view.custom.mfg = mOptions

import base64

	b = base64.b64encode(event.file.getBytes())
	
	self.view.custom.image = b

try:
		self.meta.visible = False
		utils.messages.waiting.showLoading()
		self.props.style.classes = 'wait'

		#Load property data
		name = str(self.view.custom.deviceName).strip()
		appKey = str(self.view.custom.appKey)
		devEUI = str(self.view.custom.devEUI)
		appEUI = str(self.view.custom.appEUI)
		provider =  str(self.view.custom.tagProvider)
		modelID = self.view.custom.sensorType
		tagPath = str(self.view.custom.tagPath)
		description = str(self.view.custom.deviceDescription)
		tenantID = self.session.custom.tenantID
		latitude = self.view.custom.latitude
		longitude = self.view.custom.longitude		
		image = self.view.custom.image
		if tenantID > 1:
		
			#Add device
			
			result = device.createDevice.saveDevice(devEUI, appEUI, appKey, name, "", modelID, latitude, longitude, description, provider, tagPath, image, self.session.props.auth.user.userName, 0, self.session.custom.tenantID)
			utils.messages.waiting.hideLoading()
			if utils.resultParser.isResultSuccess(result):
				successMessage = utils.resultParser.getResultMessage(result)
				if "ERROR" in successMessage:
					utils.messages.success.showSuccessWait(successMessage)
				else:
					utils.messages.success.showSuccess(successMessage)
				self.view.custom.sensorType = -1
				self.view.custom.deviceDescription = ''
				self.view.custom.tagPath = ''
				self.view.custom.appEUI = ''
				self.view.custom.devEUI = ''
				self.view.custom.appKey = ''
				self.view.custom.deviceName = ''
			else:
				utils.messages.errors.showErrorMessage(utils.resultParser.getResultMessage(result))
	
		
			self.props.style.classes=''
			self.meta.visible = True
	except Exception as e:
		system.perspective.print(e)
		syncErrorMessage = str(e)
		utils.messages.waiting.hideLoading()
		utils.messages.errors.showErrorMessage(syncErrorMessage)
		self.meta.visible = True

try:
		if self.session.custom.tenantID > 1:
			models, mfgList = utils.deviceProfileDropDown.getDeviceProfiles(1)
			
			
			tagProviders = utils.tagPathDropdown.getTagProviders()
			tagPaths = utils.normalizedTagPaths.getAllTagPaths()
			
			self.custom.models = models
			self.custom.mfgs = mfgList
			self.custom.tagPaths = tagPaths
			self.custom.tagProviders = tagProviders
			self.view.custom.sensorType = -1
			self.view.custom.image = None
			self.view.custom.latitude = self.session.props.geolocation.data.latitude
			self.view.custom.longitude = self.session.props.geolocation.data.longitude
		else:
			system.perspective.navigate(page="/")
		
	except Exception as e:
		system.perspective.print("Error loading models: " + str(e))
